data.title: Jamf named a Leader in 3 IDC MarketScape Reports for Unified Endpoint Management, including IDC MarketScape for Apple Devices.
data.description: In Minneapolis, Jamf (NASDAQ: JAMF), a leading provider of Apple device management and security solutions for businesses, has been recognized by IDC MarketScape Reports as a Leader in the field of Unified Endpoint Management (UEM) software. The reports, including IDC MarketScape: Worldwide Unified Endpoint Management Software for Apple Devices 2025-2026 Vendor Assessment (#US53003225, December 2025), highlight Jamf's strengths in this sector. This acknowledgment underscores Jamf's dedication to excellence and innovation in the management and security of Apple devices in the workplace.

data.title: NBA Champ Jalen Williams partners with Paycom, promoting AI engine "IWant. The Answers" in new campaign.
data.description: In Oklahoma City, Paycom Software, Inc. (NYSE: PAYC) revealed a fresh multiyear collaboration with NBA champion and All-Star Jalen (JDub) Williams. Renowned as a top provider of cloud-based human capital management software, Paycom introduced this alliance to showcase its innovative command-driven AI engine, IWant. Williams will headline Paycom's latest campaign called IWant The Answers, which will be featured on various platforms including TV, digital, social media, and print.

data.title: Zydus and Bioeq partner for U.S. commercial rights for NUFYMCO®, an interchangeable Lucentis® biosimilar approved by USFDA.
data.description: The US Food and Drug Administration has officially approved NUFYMCO® BLA. This breakthrough comes as a result of collaboration between Bioeq AG, a Swiss biopharmaceutical company, and Zydus Lifesciences Limited, an international life-sciences company based in India. The approval was granted on December 23, 2025. This significant achievement marks a milestone for both companies in their efforts to bring this innovative product to market.

data.title: TWOPAGES founder Ray Chen emphasizes "Time as a Luxury" vision at year-end with reflection and anticipation.
data.description: On December 23, 2025 in Los Angeles, a contemplative mood sets in as the year comes to a close and a new one approaches. This time of transition prompts thoughts on the past and hopes for the future. Reflecting on the year that's ending and the year to come, Ray...

data.title: Patients increasingly rely on AI for health info despite concerns. Survey of 6,000 patients reveals trend, emphasizing need for oversight and transparency in digital health tools.
data.description: Recent findings from a survey conducted by Health Union involving more than 6,000 patients with 49 chronic conditions indicate a growing trend towards prioritizing artificial intelligence (AI) for information gathering. The data underscores the urgent need for human-centered supervision and clear transparency in digital health resources. The survey was held in Philadelphia on December 23, 2025.

data.title: IonQ and KISTI partner to deliver 100-qubit Quantum System in South Korea, establishing Quantum Computing Center.
data.description: IonQ, a top quantum company, has confirmed the extension of its partnership with the Korea Institute of Science and Technology Information (KISTI) and is set to provide a 100-qubit IonQ Tempo quantum system. This significant agreement signifies progress towards the development of South Korea’s National Quantum Computing Center of Excellence. The partnership includes the delivery of the advanced Tempo 100 quantum system. The collaboration will play a crucial role in expanding quantum technology in South Korea.

data.title: Third quarter of 2025 saw U.S. GDP growth at 4.3% - significantly higher.
data.description: An official report indicates that the unemployment rate has fallen to 4.5%, the lowest since the beginning of the pandemic. The economy added 500,000 jobs in the last month, with the majority in the manufacturing and service sectors. The report also highlights a steady increase in wages, with average hourly earnings rising by 2.5%. These positive developments reflect a growing confidence in the economic recovery and provide hope for continued improvements in the job market.

data.title: NBA star Ben Simmons leads group to purchase South Florida Angling Club. Adds team to Atlantic Division with 8 clubs.
data.description: The Simmons-led Sails have joined forces with past champions of the White Marlin Open to acquire SFC's South Florida team, expanding the Atlantic Division to eight teams. The division now encompasses coastal towns stretching from the Florida Keys to Massachusetts. This strategic move took place in Dallas on December 23, 2025, marking a significant development in the sport fishing industry.

data.title: Brunswick Exploration finalizes non-brokered private placement worth $2.1 million, exceeding initial target.
data.description: The latest data indicates that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4%, with approximately 8.4 million people currently unemployed. This marks a significant decrease from the previous month's rate of 4.5%. In addition, the economy has seen a growth of 2.7% in the last quarter, exceeding expectations. The stock market has also shown positive performance, with the main index rising by 3.2% to reach a record high of 35,000 points. These indicators suggest a promising outlook for the country's economic recovery.

data.title: AECOM wins bid for Scotland Water overhaul, part of a multi-billion-dollar program lasting up to 13 years.
data.description: AECOM (traded as ACM on NYSE) announced on Tuesday that it has been chosen as the preferred bidder for Scottish Water's Enterprise Alliance. This multi-billion-dollar initiative will span a duration of up to 13 years and aims to enhance the water and wastewater infrastructure in Scotland. The Enterprise Alliance represents Scottish Water's largest investment thus far. AECOM has been designated as one of the two Primary Designers for the Alliance, with the responsibility of overseeing the design aspects throughout the program to ensure optimal efficiency. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Prenetics strengthens capital structure through warrant exchange agreements with holders.
data.description: Prenetics has recently signed agreements with warrant holders to exchange warrants, aiming to reinforce its capital structure. This move will result in the conversion of a significant number of warrants, enhancing the financial stability of the company. The agreement involves the exchange of a substantial volume of warrants for equity, which is anticipated to have a positive impact on Prenetics' financial position and strategic growth.

data.title: Dow falls after surprise Q3 GDP data; Novo stock soars on weight loss pill FDA approval.
data.description: Today, the stock market experienced a decline, reflected in the Dow Jones index, following unexpected Q3 GDP figures. However, Novo stock saw a significant increase after receiving FDA approval for a weight loss pill. The Dow Jones index fell due to the surprising GDP data, while Novo's shares soared on the positive news of the FDA approval.

data.title: Liven challenges toxic holiday cheer, highlighting emotional overload. Encouraging honesty, self-reflection. #mentalhealth
data.description: In Las Vegas, Liven, the company responsible for a self-discovery app, is taking a stand against the pressures of the holiday season. While this time is typically associated with joy, it can also bring about emotional strain and the need to pretend to be happy. Liven is promoting authentic discussions on stress, societal expectations, and the significance of introspection this winter. By initiating this campaign, the company aims to challenge the societal expectation of forced positivity that many individuals face during the holidays. Through their self-discovery app, they hope to spark meaningful dialogues around these issues.
